ops.title: OpDeps path validation follow-up (tilde + exit-3 consistency)
ops.description: Optional follow-up from the fail-fast read plan: ccx code deps already fails loudly (tilth exit 2) so it carries no silent-search trap, but it neither expands ~ nor maps to exit 3. Extend backend.ResolveReadPath's op switch to OpDeps for consistency once the OpRead change lands.

ops.text: ccx code deps applies the same tilde-expansion + stat + ErrPathNotFound/exit-3 semantics as OpRead, with table-driven tests
